creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Minor issue. 

The foot of the man page refers to virtual_bt_speaker(8) but there's no such page at e.g.:

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=virtual_bt_speaker&apropos=0&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+10.4-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=virtual_bt_speaker&apropos=0&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+11.4-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=virtual_bt_speaker&apropos=0&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD+12.1-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html>

– and: 

root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ # man virtual_bt_speaker
No manual entry for virtual_bt_speaker
root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ # pkg query '%o %v %R' virtual_oss
audio/virtual_oss 1.2.6_4 poudriere
root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ # date ; uname -v
Thu Oct  8 21:56:27 BST 2020
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #67 r366424: Sun Oct  4 19:54:32 BST 2020     root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG 
root@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ #
